en: possibly means, we might, we might not.
ko: 아마도라는 건, 우리가 그럴 수도 있고, 아닐 수도 있다는 뜻이야.

en: What does probably mean?
It means we have a good chance.
And what does possibly mean?
I know what it means. What does it mean?
ko: 나는 그 뜻을 알아. 그게 무슨 뜻이야?

en: It means that we're not going to the game.
ko: 우리가 경기에 가지 않을 거라는 뜻이야.

en: How did you get so smart? Because you're smart.
Are we there?
Yeah.
Mr. Ribbon?
Yes? How are you, sir?
Chris Gardner. Dean Witter.
Oh, hi. Hi. This is my son, Christopher. Hi.
ko: 아, 안녕하세요. 안녕하세요. 이쪽은 제 아들 크리스토퍼입니다. 안녕하세요.

en: Hey, Christopher. What are you doing up here?
I came to apologize for missing our appointment the other day.
Oh, you didn't need to come up. Oh, no.
ko: 아, 굳이 오실 필요는 없었어요. 아, 아니에요.

en: Actually, we were in the neighborhood visiting a very close friend of ours.
ko: 사실, 우리는 이 근처에서 아주 가까운 친구를 방문하고 있었어요.

en: And I just wanted to take this opportunity
to say thank you for your time.
I know you probably waited for me. Little bit.
ko: 아마도 당신이 저를 기다렸던 것 같아요. 조금 기다렸어요.

en: I want you to know that I do not take that for granted. No. Come on.
ko: 그걸 당연하게 여기지 않는다는 걸 알아주셨으면 해요. 아니에요. 괜찮아요.

en: What's that?
